name: Luxxfolio Holdings Inc.
summary: Luxxfolio Holdings Inc., a financial technology company, engages in developing a blockchain enabled authentication platform to verify, insure, and protect luxury goods in Canada. The company offers Luxxfolio, a cloud-based platform that offers access to financial products and services, such as credit cards, lines of credit, loans, insurance, and mortgage for a house. Luxxfolio Holdings Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
